SK hynix to Issue New Shares and Pursue U.S. ADR Listing

• SK hynix is moving forward with a plan to issue new shares and list American depositary receipts (ADRs) on the U.S. stock market. ADRs are negotiable certificates issued to enable overseas trading of a company’s shares.
